* Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Kierkegaard: Teleological Suspension and the Individual :Philosophy:
Kierkegaard
that a moment is all you got and a moment is all you ought to win, Kierkegaard draws the picture that individuality, your telos, can only be of the domain of the finite. Of the domain of zero measure. One eternal moment, and no more, which comes back to the paradoxical nature of the act of abraham, of the infinite movement that one cannot understand through one's corrupt system, like that of usain bolt. Perhaps hinting that morality is what one should surrender to, omnipresent to all moments and movements, yet beyond one's telos, beyond one's range. Dual and apparently in contradiction to the principle of the self that I get from Nietzsche. Of the will all powerful that one can bring about. Yet one would be limiting himself if himself was all that he had to count on. To be whole one, even more ambitious than previously, has to play with the mutual enhancement of the external and the internal, the overmoment the real, the eternal the ideal that yet gives strength to the killing of the moment, that we sacrifice beyond now our god, really ourselves, like abraham in his movement did. God did. We can get disattached to reality, as much as it can be useful and increasing of the will to power. The duality of the self contained teleologically suspended morality with the ever changing will driven telos of the self.

* Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Not Lost in the General, Not Limited in the Individual :Philosophy:
One doesn't get lost in the general, one doesn't get limited in the individual, one brings forth different kinds of powers, powers of necessity, one can complexifies yet also simplify his achievement of piece of mind. One has a place to surrender and a place to conquer. One is thus even more changeable. The weight he carries on his shoulders is that which he so wills.

* Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- The MMA Athlete's Tribute Beyond Themselves :Life:
This is the different breed that some mma athletes bring to the table, something beyond themselves that they pay tribute, that they owe on their life, that they must give themselves to.

* Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Not Getting Lost in the General :Philosophy:
One thus doesn't get lost in the general, but one also doesn't lose his moment, for in his mind he can have a substrate of the eternal he so ceases.

* Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Faith Brings the Individual Higher :Philosophy:
I have doubts as to whether faith brings the individual lower or higher than god. Faith well pulled can make the individual transcend, rather than be a slave of an higher cause. In fact this may be the very challenge, what makes it hard to reconcile these two reactive beasts, these two antiparticles of a thing that must thus live in one's mind. You ought to believe in a higher power and yet be able to stare it in the face. You build fear out of yourself and out of yourself grows courage. There is overcoming.

* Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- The Courage to Express Maximally :Philosophy:
That one may have the courage to express himself maximally, his telos, beyond the infinite, the unfathomable infinite of the eternal that oversees it.

* Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- The Courage to Express Maximally II :Philosophy:
That one may have the courage to express himself maximally, his telos, beyond the infinite, the unfathomable infinite of the eternal that oversees and for many outshines every movement out of its life, subjugates it into its lowest form.

* Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Hearing People Too Literally :Life:
And many times we and I make the mistake of hearing too literally what the people say. Maybe giving too much importance to that which comes out of the mouth in detriment of implicit action that they may or may not be aware, that they may or may not intend. In detriment of the feeling that powers those words, that they may or may not be aware, that they may or may not intend. That the real effects at times are not to be found in the meanings of the words, that language in this reduced sense is arbitrary and very particular, we forget that, that we may neglect the faith that may be powering the beliefs powering the words. We sometimes judge too much on what is said rather than the effect for oneself of saying that.

* Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Open-Mindedness and the Infinite Faith :Philosophy:
That encourages open mindedness and respect and tolerance for others' beliefs and thoughts and actions and words. Missing that is reducing the whole world to something not even we understand. So take advantage of all information that comes with a word. At the end of the day the maximum performant effective as in useful processing power in processing one second of the universe at every second, for you process it all, including yourself, in this convergent ever less adding series of informations that connect the whole. This argument actually has some problems. the point is that to express maximally not only do you want to be fluent in every language but you want to hear of them at once, never being stuck to one for one occasion, so you can wholistic understanding and win time. Not just gain time, but win time. With that processing power.

* Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- The Greater Lesson: Faith as a Zero :Philosophy:
The greater lesson we can draw from here with faith is that you don't want to neglect the paradoxical and that which doesn't fit in your system. Even for what doesn't fit paradoxically there should be space. Integrate into your ship, your arsenal, this touch of paradox, of unexplainable, touch of the reason of no reason. Faith in this sense is really a zero, whose invention made us more free. We don't need reasons so as to act on something, so as to win the world. Even without justifications we are able to do so in one movement. The history of finding zeroes is really one of writting off assumptions that limit our power. In essence really taking a meta faith on our power to have power, which leads us to get rid of the self created monsters. Assume you can do more with less. And that you already have a tremendous amount of things you want to do in this world, then you can afford to dare skip what you don't want, getting out of it only what you want with the minimum possible taken from your flight over and beyond the mere human.

* Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- The Knight of Faith Acts Without Apparent Reason :Philosophy:
That this movement of the infinite faith can only be integrated by a mind of such open mindedness that one doesn't think the world is absurd, but one doesn't reject the possibility that one can't even think of how absurd it is. Thus you must master the duality of both having absolute faith in yourself and yet by virtue of making faith part of your language knowing that the absurd may be out there.
know that you may not know anything about the world yet going for it all the same. This is the courage only human is capable of, and only the human that can know so much to know he doesn't know and yet believe all the same.

* Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Faith in Faith :Philosophy:
Faith in faith, such is measured the spirit of your open mindedness. Wow again its a self referential self enforcing belief. Its not that one is controlled by the beliefs he controls, but that one controls the beliefs that one is controlled by.

* Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- The Absurd as Excusable Obstacle :Philosophy:
That the absurd is excusable, understandable as an obstacle to movement. That yet the higher and bolder faith in the absurd isn't, the absurd is always seen as something outside the will. Only an unbound will can hold within the controlled absurd, the belief in the absurd and its potential power to guide one. Thus an all encompassing will will have many traits, however closed or disclosed they shall be, they may never be used, but they shall be there for when one needs it. One can thus always rise to the occasion, as a matter of principle, that one may not shy away from the craziest of mental states and beliefs and faiths that others may find incoherent, contradictory, irrational.

* On the Questions of Consciousness :Philosophy:
Conscious states in this sense involve a form of meta-mentality or meta-intentionality in so far as they require mental states that are themselves about mental states. 
    The Descriptive Question: What is consciousness? What are its principal features? And by what means can they be best discovered, described and modeled? 
    The Explanatory Question: How does consciousness of the relevant sort come to exist? Is it a primitive aspect of reality, and if not how does (or could) consciousness in the relevant respect arise from or be caused by nonconscious entities or processes?

Esse conceito que não me pertençe

Esse pesadelo que me persegue
Esse irónico sentimento

* Math space exploration volume determination :Math:
Simple way with a small chip to determine the volume of a space is to put it inside, and instead of it moving and searching the space, that is terribly inneficient and not easy, you send light in all directions and on the easiet way they would just reflect back, you calculate the r coordinate, the distance and integrate, summing over all azimutal angles and polar angles. If there are spaces for which light keeps going beyond the others around it, then you place the chip there for the next iteration.
Maybe a way for things to reflect back is to send precisely mirrors that stuck to the walls and send the light back, the approxumation is better the more angles we go through. Of course its numeric and doesnt leverage the symmetries of the system

* goal achieving through proxies and continual direction/metric change :Business:
That the soul pushing in all directions also allows one to get away from biases, cause every time you define a goal to move foward, there is a loophole associated with that goal, but if you move those small little goals around you separate yourself from those loopholes and move foward in the name of the greater goal, fractally
For example if you define the goal of writing the most in terms of lenght in the name of great writing you willl jave the tendency to write too much, and thus you go the way of building your metric and not reaching your goal, in fact the longer youvstick to a metric the more you get adapated to it, you maximize its use even if it is a bad projecton of the higher unreducible goal.
Uncertainty principle right here between the resolution you have at the level of the representation of your goal being true to your goal and the resolution of your goal, the more resolved it is the more you understand the metric
Thus the way is to again overcome goals that tou no longer need them to do soemthing, you no longe rneed motivation or goals or tracking, it is part of you

* locating and isolating collective intelligence :Philosophy:
so they say that intelligence is a spectrum, and in the argument that it emerges they pinpoint to colelctive intelligence of ants backed by emergent complex structures necessary for thier life.
But where is the intelligence? Cause if we say that a single ant is dumb and only does left right feromone actions, and we say there is colective intelligence, then it follows quite simply that either there is something which is the intelligence in command. But there isn't right? Unless my collective intelligence we mean truly an intelligence build through the entanglement of the ants, which ultimtely may be true too, but we can also think that the complex structure that emerge came to be randomly, and so how did it get there? EVolution, not on the level of the individual but on the level of the collective, diffeente collectievs woulda produced different structures and only this collective intelligence was chosen, many were tried. the gene may be the fundamental unit of evolution, but not the only one, not the maximum expression of evolution which thus come sin all scales.

* reaping the beneficts of distributed :Technology:
Distrivuted representation and distributed usation. Every image goes into the outpot, but no single one really goes, thats the nature of compressing and having a world model decentralized but also contributed by everyone. So a single node takes part in representing everything and so is used also for everything we want to generate by representation. One could think all nodes contribute even if by lesser ppwers a la taylor series, but in lractocal discrete comlutation that is prpbably not the case.

* trivial remark on privacy in language models :Technology:

* Physics Informing Neural Networks :Physics:
just like there is physics informed neural networks I propose there are physics informing neural networks, where either you give the freedom of the model to get supraphysical predictions that yield better results and then perhaps just like we build in the autograd things for the model to have a virtual physical loss we could use those objects for the model to express it's findings in the form of known mathematical functions and not just the blackbox NN function. Perhaps better we could build them in pair, one trying to inform as much as possible while the other is trying to be informed as much as possible in a inimax game.
this thing up here takes into account that getting zero physical loss may not be optimal, or getting just the loss associated to uncertainty in the experiment, it is constrained optimization so it can constrain us if we are not careful about it's application
the thing about pinss and other methods, is they leverage that thing of the infinites not existing and thus all contibutions being finite. Namely, if you only care about the data, through the hyperparameter in pareto fronts multi objective loss functions, then you will overfit and not get infomration out of the NN, if you only use physics, through again making that coefficient go to inf you wont't get any information out of the NN because you are only attacking the data with physics. So the optimal has to be somewhere finite in between with a finite coefficient for both losses. Now these pareto fronts decompose physics from data, but we can probably further decompose the physics loss, becasue this way we only reap the rewards of the explotatory space along two axis, but we can make this more multidimensiona, and thus jhave new literal curves of attack. Right, not all physics is worth the same for our experiments or is established in the same way, we have different uncertainties about different pjhysis, so we shoudln't impose that prior on the Loss.

* learning to be god again, learning to be human again :Philosophy:
The new picture of the overhuman, superintelligent AI like being that flies over humans, yet is able to play at their level.
Cause if you had a greater processing speed, or you were just at another level in life, you want to forge and incentivate that core that you have that is imcomputable and incomensurable with the rest of the world in particular humans, so not making humans get on the way of your flying, yet be with them at the same time. Being there but not really being there. Cause, if you have that, it is truly annoying to have it stripped of you. It is a great pain being obligated to being something lesser when you know you can be more, doing work that is lesser than what you can do, thinking about things smaller than those you can handle. If you dont know your lower than it is no stress, but knowing it and having to fly low is a pain. It is a pain to be more ambitious than everyone around you and knowing that and not doing anything about can be a depression that drains your soul. It may even release, these drives, to unwanted parts of your life. So how does a being that is orders of magnitude more ambitious than the rest, more long term strategic oriented, how does he reconcile living with others
That means doing the same things faster, it means playing at another level of the game, it means squeezing the most out of the moment, it means flying over and beyond it, it means seeing deeper than anyone into it, it means seeing the bigger picture, a bigger picture than anyone and having this bigger picture present
It means independence from humans, let them do their things while you do yours, yet you do theirs as long as you are not bound to them.
This is a game you can play, an operational powerhouse of your flying over. Perspective is frightening, it is scary to always see many sides of something, to see the size of things, but it is a damn saviour, and i am damn geateful for it.
Now persepctive is a fucker. It can hinder and enhance you. It can stop you, it can stop most if they only knew some things. Yet reality always comes to the surface, and it makes you resistant to it. It can either save you or rob you of the present. Of innocence.

* dynamics of expansion of knowledge and of the unknown :Math:
If information is conserved then as we know more there is less to know, even if we dont know it. Now people always say the boundary of what you dont know increases with what you know. And this is for two dimensions modelling your knowledge as a cirle. But the dynamics of this and the space of exploration inside higher dimensions is very different, as stacking balls shows. Deep seek said that in high dimensions random vectors are orthogonal. But even disconsidering that this cannot be right forever if information is finite. If the whole information is a circle it will go right down to zero once you know it all, what you dont know and what you know you dont know. For other shapes the decrease will be more gradual

* Computational Complexity in other computation models :Technology:
Pspace is contained in exptime, and we know the constant that multiples the polynomial on the exponent is log2(3), because the possible number of configurations on deterministic turing machine is at least bounded by 3 to the n  on n space, cause each configuration has 3 parameters, thought there seems to be no extra restriction that bounds this number even more. But the question can be posed cause if turing machine is just a model of computation, so maybe in other models the number of parameters for configurations can be less. However we degined this for the turing machine so we have clear and coherent notions of space and time, tho in other models of conputation the relations between the classes could perhaps be different.

* information theoretic faulty data injection attack and message encoding in video :Technology:

* good follow up :Life:

Its recommendation/ suggestions are next level, amd when it has data on you they will be even better, it will effectively read your mind, you can just give it an initial startibg point and it makes the whole trajectory of the conversation advance, you just have to say yes do that repeateadly. So where as before I made multiple prompts while reading the first answer now I can wait and see if I want to go in that direction or in the recomended one. * killed time, in search of lost time :Philosophy:
People have this sadness when they realize they are no longer impacted by the death of their parents, it has gone trhough them, they cant cry anymore. I have this condition with the killing of time. Of my time that has been murdered, pushed underground, smothered. Bury it i wont let you bury it.

* optimizer for gradient descent :Math:
to chat gpt:

in the gradient descent algorithm I was wondering what would be the most efficient learning rate. What I got to, and want you opinion on, is that thinking of the step after getting the gradient vector, what fundamentally will happen, in the limit you go with super small learning rate, is you will trace out the path descending on the direction of largest decrease until that changes. So the most efificnet learning path would be, in terms of steps, to go down as far as possible as loing as the direction in which you are going down aligns with the opposite of gradient, and right there change to the next. The minorant on the number of steps would be the number of direction changes. Now of course for continuous functions directions can change just a bit, so we'd have to be guaranteed that the small deviations on the path, if there are any, and in general there are, dont take us away from the next "milestone" per say. So if you have to fix a step then it would be that which minimizes the aggregate of these steps. For example the smallest of them, as in the smallest distance between points where gradient significantly changes. That is an example, it doesnt generalize as the best procedure for all cases but is a start

* two speed paradox, in out paradox :Physics:

* sailing in zig zag :Philosophy:
Inconsistency as being connected to truth, emerson sailing side to side.
He points out that when you look and see soneone wobling and changing course you may think they are crazy, they may be missunderstood. You no longer understand what is the endpoint they strive or how, if you think you know their endpoint, they are going to reach it or why they are going on such undirected route.
Yudkowsky said it that if you are right you already know it. So going on the same direction is not necessarily the way to go, for those who dont know the endpoint, let alone if some dont even know where they are. Not all who wander are lost emerson said.

* personal space :Life:
Having your own house is fundamental
Your own space to do your suff and think your things. Through comparative advantage the more you do things people deem crazy, and being seen as crazy is a thing that doesnt matter much but still is a loss for you, the more having your own space is crutial, for then you can do exactly as you please, and hopefully you have the right intentions with that. For example imagine you had to take cold showers with everyone knowing, or had to train with everyone knowing exactly what you did. Privacy is important for this.

* impact :Life:
Great consequence is the thing to strive for. Move with great consequence. And make your moves have great consequence. Some people have great potential, and are super smart for some things, but sometimes they do nothing with it. Imagine being einstein but all you do is learn physics without writing anyrhing, not giving your input. People desire consequence, not the cause. Thanks paul graham for remembering this. They may search the cause  but only for the consequence. And there are those who dont have many causes, and yet great conseqences. They become world champions, without having the things that people say make a world champion. You make people say what makes a world champion.

* very surprising :Life:
That cross entropy is unbounded above makes it that in assigning zero probability to an event and yet it happens, under your model, is the higest learning thing, it instantaneously invalidates your model, its the only way. In yudkowzky's sequences he mentions that testing your model on negative cases, those where things happen, experiences that wasnt anticipated, for which your model simply doesnt account for, sonething like this. And it connects with this framework i now have in mind of maximizing surprisal, cross entropy with your world model. The sad part is cause you converge on the real world there is less and less to learn, and after you get sufficiently close this option of improving is gone for you. So you wont have more earth and ground breaking knowledge, like that of when you heard of relativity for the first time, or these things. The nuggets get smaller and smaller

So you do things in an unconventional way, you explore and exploit quite fast, the subject is subject to phases, you may go for the hard path, you may do stuff flowing on the rush to know more, maybe those things that you wanna know about right now have no relation to what you are supposed to do per say. * persepheus's world :Philosophy:
With design of computer systems we get a glimpse into what things the human mind and brain may be composed of, or at least a language that may have some correlation with it. Computer virus, corrupted files, that by stochasticity change themselves, like mutations. Everythibg is changing. Its that thing of your molecules are renewed, that is, you are made of a new set of molecules on average after some time.  So what you build informs you of what built it. By trying to design a language do you get the concepts that evolution ran through, tho evolution wasnt doing it on purpose. By trying to build something humans already built do you understand the evolution in them to build that and the evolution of which they learned by building the thing, for example an airplane via birds.
Now just like that set of molecules humans are always being substituted in this world. The point is there is nothing ever permament, what you do now has some retrocausality on what was there before it. Thats how your file system, your system, is changed. What happens now affects your view on what was there before.

* mind games :Life:
Your mind plays many tricks on you. When running, it may make you wiggle more, make your head ho side to side and all over the place. It gives you the appearance that you are going faster, it gives you the appearance of overstimulus, that it seems there are a lot of things to control and thus you dont have RAM for more, and it increases your perceived effrot. If one the other hand you stay composed, you see how low the effort is on the scale of effort, you see a whole world. That scale is sort of like the yudkowsky intelligence scale. Beyond catalogue there is a lot of space for improvement. People do this in their day with appearing busy and hard working to themselves. But once you squeeze the day, little juice comes out. Quite particular is the appearence of no consciousness, since you are overloaded you dont come back to yourself. If rather,during the run, during the day, you come back to yourself and notice you are still you, tha is simple and powetful and shows whatever is going on outside, you are still here, so youre good, fundamentally. Actually pushing it is when you cant even find yourself to think.

In the high ground your best version plays at, the floor you must make sure is rock solid, so that you own this high ground. How truly do you believe ib yoir ideal? Cause people sometimes stretch themselves, in that their ideal is far from what they act for. But if you have the balls to declare to yourself that you are a missionary of your ideal, then be prepared to be tested. Be prepared to sacrifice things for your ideal. This makes your ideal both the up there thing that cant be touched, as well as the dirty everyday everytime bottom core which never gets out of you. Both your maximum and your minimum.

* manifesting intelligence explosion in humans :AI:
They talk about intelligence explosion, that is what is happening with me. You get exponentially faster. They talk about in this rise the sudden or not so sudden moment where the lamp of consciousness lights uo. Yap. Born anew. Somewhere along the way you stretched the fabric of spacetime into a singularity, and you are new and for the first time with consciousness. You get progressive levels of consciousness. Lenght contraction as you speed to the limits.

* do you :Life:
Owing everything you do. Imagine you are just a great polititian, but for the sake of health or whatever you go run here and there. You are not in your ballpark. But if your ball park is both being polititian and running like crazy, then its part of you

* damn right :Life:
Expanding on the usual thought experiment: theres somebody out there working harder than you
There is someone out there convinced they know you and can predict you. There is someone out there who thinks they have you under control.
Theres someone out there watching your every move
Theres someone out there copying your every move.

* pressure for performance, you are being watched :Life:
Simple principle worth emphasizing, many people have said this, not mine of saying but mine of owning and doing
Always outwork the person next to you, be the hardest worker in the room, and when you are alone, work even harder. It applies to training, to studying, to living life, to socializing.... Now it is easier said than done to work harder alone. Performance often increases with others watching, as you try to impress them or not be embarassed. Certain musics, or filming training for example gets the same efect of pressure for performamce

* the fastest :Life:
Speed of thought is of course faster than its instantiations in physical media for example writing. But this has specific consequences. Just thinking alone, doing things in your head to solve a problem, time flows much slower, you get way more done.

* master manipulation :Life:
Oz pearlman, he gets stuff right and it seems the space of exploration is huge. how can he be sure. Goes back to yudkowsky post on how einstein was so certain of general relativity. He got some bits of information, spanning exponential space. The difference between his knowledge of this and our bad ability to obtain the same bits of information makes the whole shock. We are clueless inside that space. Now if in this space there is this much to grab beyind the low hanging fruit, just imagine how good an AI can get at this.
Reverse engineering of programs is important, reverse engineering of AI, and with this reverse engineering of humans and thoughts. But now im trying to reverse engineer this guy's methods and implications for the world model we have of the mind. Or maybe this oz pearlman stuff is really just more bulshit than it seems. There is some real skill but perhaps he doesnt have the full skill, yet I think its possible to have the full skill he claims to have
So this was before I discovered the whole thing, after that I developed the whole theory, so this was when I thought he had figured some free will defying stuff

He is on all of the drugs, he is on all of the pills, he is on everything

* computational irreducibility in taking decisions :Math:
Inma sound a lil stephen wolfram with big claims of concepts chaining together, but consciousness in humans is such a trivial thing that determines what happens. You can convince yourself you are going to do something for days but you cant turn to autopilot, you will live every moment of those moments, and that brings about great possibility of going off plan. Computational irreducibility of history that makes it informative. Decisions matter for this, and they feel as if they matter too cause you cant predict them.

* AI-human :AI:
I make all kinds of analogies between my learning and AI learning, but the thing is its actually literally true. Your brain may not use backprop but you can effectively imagine it does. You really learn weights and have beliefs world model and loss functions as your values. The thing is the brain is not even interpretable, as in we dont know enough of its architecture and fucntioning to play the mechanistic interpretability game.

* the bet :Life:
In training AI models we are betting that there is information to be gained in a certain task, certain hidden variables that make the latent space rich in structure and that allow great insight. Or else we wont gain anything out of them. We effectively have not physics informed models but informed models about whatever task. That information we have allows us to get a glimpse into higher structures that we think the model can appropriate itself of when riding the high dimensional (for example) spaces we put it through.

* higher signal to noise ratio in scaling laws :AI:
Distilling intelligence, Richard Aragon's insight that the solution space may be smaller and scaling laws only get us more of these solution spaces while addibg a lot of junk. Thus a kind of recursion definition of intelligence comes through: lossless compression not of information but of the information processing system itself.

* the escape route to entropy :Physics:
Go so fast that time slows down. Time starts to freeze, you do so much and not much time has passed. Thankfully

* diversify :Business:
This idea of following a predefined path brings you to be a predefined person, more or less the same as the personified one you followed. Now if instead of follwoing and trying to be like 1 person full package, as in they may not be the best at anything, but they conbine many things, you will only get as good as that. * optimization process for recommendation :Technology:
In high dimensional and rich spaces, as in qualitatively there are a lot of regions, evolution converges very slowly, for you need randomness to eventually hit the solution, whereas learning drives you to it.
Now when it comes to searching content in the world, through youtube for example, the algorithm doesnt seem to be good enough to escape this behaviour of betting on randomness, it is better than evolution in this sense but worse than a gradient descent of sorts, it takes time giving you what you want. So I had a topic that I wanted to dive into some long time ago, and only today did it give me something resembling it. Of course perhaps I didnt search well enough, and there isnt the exact thing i was after, and the algorithm didnt recommend to me well enough.

* is time passing or are you passing time :Philosophy:
You can value your day much more than 24 hours. Most people value it less, for they allow time to be wasted in commuting and what not. What if you could make any time be valuable, but also making sleep time valuable through lucid dreaming of sorts, which Im not even close to being able to right now, watching videos faster than 1x speed. Effectively doing shortcuts to may things, so you dont allow your time to be booked irrespective of merit. A 2 hour class is 2 hours regardless of wether you get everything after the fiest slide or dont get anything, and again you can do multiple things at once there. Sometimes it can be sad that you arent present in something at 100 percent per say, like classes. Thats why people say oh if I had time I would actually learn this properly or do things right, but they end up shortcutting. But this allows you to do much more.

* inspired from eletrodynamics, acting in the future :Physics:
Being ahead of the curve, among where the object isnt yet
Now being so ahead has the downside for pleasure of enjoying this moment that you are already out of it, you are just reaping the fruits of the past where you interacted with future and were future minded to give birth to this moment and those activities that fill it and fullfill it.
When you already believe a la topuria, working the cause after the vision, you dont need yes man, they shouldnt be able to add to your belief, and they cant raise rhe bar on you or have higher standards for yourself than yourself, they shouldnt be able to add to you. No-man are the only ones that can add, wether they are right or wrong. You let the end fixed, and just allow others to steer you there with your help. And in the modern world where atention is so searched for, you need none. You are pure of acting and for action in this world
And the story writes itself, that you build confidence by earning it, you dont need proof of work or concept, you go for it as you gain the ability to go for it.
And belief cares nothing for the past, a strong enough belief carries you to your destination no matter where you are. And a la stoics all you can control is your belief, how much intent ypur inner world carries as it battles its will with the worlds's.
The possibility that the most rooted thing is the one that wills its way to reality is important.
Cause again you can fight and fight and rage against the dark to not go gentle into that dark night, the knight of night, but either you fully own it or it eventually pressures you into submition. For a lot of things people dont dare go deep enough for something to be deeply rooted, and so they actually resort and come back and find confort in equilibrium, not improving
It could be argued  that a life without improving is one devoid of time, but still freedom prevails, and this can only be true and say a lot about those who say it, not of life itself
Fake it until you make it, but it turns out you cant fake it. Either you believe or you dont, do or do not, there is no try
Hit the target no one sees. Hit the target no one knows exist. Eletrodynamics the field pointing to where the particle is in the future, thats what makes you advance, is pointing beyond where you are to move there. If you point to the same place you get a constant function. You gotta intersect the future. If you always move where the target moved last iteration you are always one step behind it.

* application of the bet in AI systems :Life:
So that thing of betting that there is information to be gained on underlying structure is the general principle whose application leads to the cold start recommendation problem. Lets think in the limit. In the limit the world model knows al the basis constituints at all scales of the whatever objects it has as input. Thus it doesnt have a problem of cold start. In fact by knowing he underlying physics so well it may have already imagined whatever the cold start object is or at least expect its existence, in a way this goes back to inventing vs discovering

* the unstoppable force against the immovable object :Physics:
Ther are two competing forces in the information of the universe: the sucessive entanglement through observation thst collapses possibilities from the wave function of the universe and universe as superposition and the information you gain by taking the measurements and breaking superposition, the most power being in the universe is the whole universe uncollapsed, its fulll of potential and its computational capability its tremendous, its the biggest quantum computer, the only quantum computer in fact.

* fast discussions and debates :Life:
Just like LLMS and google brought a fast end to discussions, as in those family table discussion that otherwise wohld be long and contentful, so will smarts contracts and negotations through AI agent's code formalize debates so that right away we can get to mathematical truth, without being vague and debating on the semantics front instead of the mathematical front which we sometimes have difficulty translating into words. So an automated AI that translates arguments to code with bayesian probabilities... Can cut debates short to disagree only on the priors of the participants, and making them relaize the difference in world models they have.

* neurosymbolic :AI:
Perhaps combining symbolic knowledge with the learned implicit knowledge that deep learning excels at gives us a revolution. Perhaps the brain combines them both in a way that one reinforces the other.
The brain had millions and millions of years of evolution, and we think its way of updating is random in mutations, but perhaps it is not, not sure. The thing is in some amount of years way less than millions we can reconstruct a similar capability as the brain. If mutations are really random, SGD is way more efficoent, and so in the search problem of finding this intelligence solution we can be way more efficient than evolution searching the space for more time. A way of merging both paradigms is if somehow the symbolic logic knowledge can be extracted or derived from the latent world model space, through interpretability. So that you have both a distributed hierarchically compositional structure where infrmation flows but also centralization in that you can get specific facts out of it, as in partitoning the space, so that we dont depend on the super complex manifold for everything and we can actually work with smaller specific things.

* all cards on the table, face up :Life:
George hotz saying he holds no secrets, he can tell you what he is gonna do because he is so confident that you competing he wins. This is a belief that prompts you to be a winner. He is essentially saying he has the it factor. In fact competing on equal grounds gives even more motivation, for now you know its for real and the chip inside you turns, you are ready to give everything to win. This is a conseguence of freedom of information and freedom of action. There is no fundamental information assymetry, everyone can play the game.

* the mutual enforcing sides of the coin :Philosophy:

Solving intellligence, including biological intelligemce nad artificial intelligence to have scaled up version of superintelligence with superefficiency, more efficiency than biological intelligence, and merging both in the human through BCIs for example to be able to understand the superintelligemce better

* promising :Life:
when people say you are promissing, believe it and promiss it, put that pressure onto you and go get it, be grateful thta someone saw something in you, never dissapoint them.

* Idea/Essay: Coisa de engomadeira :Writing:
"A engomadeira",  de José de Almada de Negreiros, é um quadro de 1938, onde, em jeito caricato e metafórico,
é criticada a posição na qual as mulheres se podiam encontrar em 1938, embora possa se generalize para os tempos que correm.
Observamos uma mulher, torta e desmontada (ombros e anca deslocados relativamente ao corpo), engomando o ferro,
numa sala escura, apenas iluminada pela luz que rebenta pela janela,. A cor do vestido perde-se na tonalidade das paredes da sala.
Por cima da cabeça, flutuando pelos ares, está um pássaro preso numa sala.
A meu ver, a engomadeira é revista como um pássaro que tenta cantar, mas que é ofuscado pelas grossas paredes que o cercam.
É este o cenário que abarca a mulher do quadro, símbolo da mulher como entidade ,visto que, assim se depreende, só engoma por obrigação
 (não transmite satisfação de todo), e por obrigação só engoma, não obstante o rouxinol cantante que talvez tenha dentro de si.
É no meio disto, então, que, do meu ponto de vista, surge a luz, bem lá atrás: o mundo lá fora, o desconhecido, o que nunca será conhecido pela engomadeira,
porque é engomadeira, e engomadeira será. Considero que esta forma de colocar a luz no quadro acentua o seu cariz crítico.
É também uma prisioneira do tempo, porque está presa em coisa de outro tempo, o trabalho doméstico forçado.
Desmontada por dentro e por fora, de cabelo caído. Foi, enfim, tão puxada e consumida por um ambiente desgostoso que chega mesmo a adquirir
a textura da parede, como se pode ver nos traços de que está cheia, a título de exemplo, a sua cara. Assim, chega-nos a ideia de que a engomadeira
passa a ser o ferro de engomar, as paredes, e também a madeira. Ela é o que faz, pelo menos aos olhos da sociedade, embora aquilo que faça não seja o que ela é.
Muito pelo contrário: para se lançar luz sobre quem é (em vez de "o que" é), a engomadeira deveria escapar àquela sala quase impenetrável,
libertando o rouxinol cantante para fora da janela.
Em suma, penso que este quadro visa denunciar a falta de liberdade de algumas mulheres, que são vítimas de um estereótipo velho que ainda resiste, e que,
deste modo, são impedidas de se realizar.
